name: K9-04 Noroi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｋ９</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケーナイン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－０４<ruby lang="jp"><rb>号</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>咒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ノロイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If your opponent has 2 or more cards in their hand, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. You can only use each of the following effects of "K9-04 Noroi" once per turn. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 non-Machine "K9" monster from your Deck, but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "K9" monsters, while you control that face-up monster. You can send 1 face-up "K9" card you control to the GY; look at your opponent's hand.
mnst_eff: If your opponent has 2 or more cards in their hand, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. You can only use each of the following effects of "K9-04 Noroi" once per turn. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 non-Machine "K9" monster from your Deck, but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "K9" monsters, while you control that face-up monster. You can send 1 face-up "K9" card you control to the GY; look at your opponent's hand.
eff: If your opponent has 2 or more cards in their hand, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. You can only use each of the following effects of "K9-04 Noroi" once per turn. If this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 non-Machine "K9" monster from your Deck, but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "K9" monsters, while you control that face-up monster. You can send 1 face-up "K9" card you control to the GY; look at your opponent's hand.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
